entity.nomansland.frienderman.descriptio: A passive mob resembling an Enderman wearing an ancient Alchemist mask.
entity.nomansland.billhook_bass.descript: An aquatic neutral mob found in murkier rivers and swamps. Fits in a bucket.
entity.nomansland.buddy.description: A mushroom-infested passive mob found in the Mushroom Fields.
entity.nomansland.deer.description: A passive mob found in forests. Has unique antler variants.
entity.nomansland.goose.description: A neutral mob found next to bodies of water. Spreads wings defensively when approached.
entity.nomansland.tortoise.description: A passive mob found in drier environments. Enters its shell at night.
entity.nomansland.living_pot.description: A neutral mob resembling a walking Ancient Pot.
tag.nomansland.trimmed_planks.descriptio: A polished building material made from planks.
tag.nomansland.edible_mushrooms.descript: Any mushrooms which can be eaten.
lore.nomansland.autumnal_oak_sapling: Typically found within the Autumnal Forest, these trees have distinct deep orange leaves, otherwise resembling regular Oak Trees. They tend to vary slightly in size.
lore.nomansland.pine_sapling: Pines are pointy trees, mainly found within colder biomes. Their colors resemble a more desaturated version of Spruce Trees.
lore.nomansland.yellow_birch_sapling: Found within a variety of forests, these trees have distinct yellow leaves, otherwise resembling regular Birch Trees.
lore.nomansland.maple_sapling: Typically found within the Maple Forest, these trees have unique leaf patterns. They tend to vary slightly in size.
lore.nomansland.red_maple_sapling: Typically found within the Maple Forest, these trees have distinct red leaves. They tend to vary slightly in size.
lore.nomansland.walnut_sapling: This tree appears in denser forests, categorized by their light brown wood and murkier leaves.
lore.nomansland.willow_sapling: Typically found within swamps, this tree tends to have a wider leaf coverage than other trees. It tends to have vines growing off of it.
lore.nomansland.pale_cherry_sapling: Found within a variety of forests, these trees resemble regular cherry trees besides their distinct white and green leaves.
lore.nomansland.ink_bomb: A throwable bomb which creates a blinding ink cloud shortly after landing.
lore.nomansland.firebomb: A throwable explosive bomb which causes damage and starts fires for entities with the Flammable effect.
lore.nomansland.explosive: A throwable stick of explosives which creates a destructive explosion and starts fires for entities with the Flammable effect.
lore.nomansland.ancient_bronze_mask: A wearable, bronze Alchemist face mask.
lore.nomansland.incendiary_arrow: An arrow which starts a fire upon landing.
lore.nomansland.tortoise_shell: A wearable shell which negates all rear-inflicted damage at the cost of slower movement.
lore.nomansland.resin_oil_bottle: An item that can be thrown to make entities Flammable.
lore.nomansland.bandage: A usable item which provides a small amount of healing.
lore.nomansland.medicinal_bandage: A usable item which provides a small amount of healing and removes debuffs.
lore.nomansland.antidote_bandage: A usable item which provides a small amount of healing and removes poison.
lore.nomansland.warding_bandage: A usable item which provides a small amount of healing and extra absorption.
lore.nomansland.tap: A block which can be placed on pine trees above a cauldron to gather resin.
lore.nomansland.resin: An item with a variety of uses. Flows into a cauldron when placing a Tap above a Cauldron on a Pine Tree.
lore.nomansland.sconce_torch: A decorative torch that can be used to light up your world so monsters don't spawn.
lore.nomansland.sconce_soul_torch: A dim decorative torch that can be used to light up your world so monsters don't spawn.
lore.nomansland.music_disc_guidance: A music disc that can be played in a jukebox. Given to you by a Friend.
lore.nomansland.warding_effigy: A mysterious totem which prevents mob spawning within a nearby radius.
lore.nomansland.awkward_residue: An edible dark-green paste with a foul smell. Can be used for brewing.
lore.nomansland.spike_trap: A block which continuously inflicts damage to any entity standing on it.
lore.nomansland.moonlight_candle: A larger candle illuminated by a Friend. Burns with white flames.
lore.nomansland.sturdy_scute: A piece of shell shed by a baby Tortoise after growing up.
lore.nomansland.tortoise_egg: An egg that will eventually turn into a baby Tortoise. Very fragile!
lore.nomansland.living_urn: A throwable urn. Pacifies hostile mobs upon impact.
lore.nomansland.monster_anchor: A block which revives mobs spawned from nearby Monster Spawners.
lore.nomansland.billhook_bass_bucket: A bucket with a Billhook Bass inside.
lore.nomansland.polished_siltstone: A block of Siltstone which has been polished.
lore.nomansland.polished_stone: A block of Stone which has been polished.
lore.nomansland.cobblestone_bricks: A block of Cobblestone that has been carved into bricks.
lore.nomansland.cracked_cobblestone_bric: A cracked, decaying form of regular Cobblestone Bricks.
lore.nomansland.mossy_cobblestone_bricks: A block of Cobblestone Bricks covered in moss.
lore.nomansland.faded_stone_bricks: A block of Stone which was carved into bricks long ago.
lore.nomansland.silt_bricks: A block of Silt which has been carved into bricks.
lore.nomansland.dross_tiles: A combination of Tuff and Silt resembling a tile pattern.
lore.nomansland.mundane_tiles: A combination of Terracotta and Cobblestone Bricks resembling a tile pattern.
lore.nomansland.coarse_bricks: A combination of Silt and Brick which has been carved into bricks.
lore.nomansland.mossy_coarse_bricks: A block of Coarse Bricks covered in moss.
lore.nomansland.cobbled_deepslate_bricks: A block of Cobbled Deepslate carved into bricks.
lore.nomansland.chiseled_siltstone: A block of Polished Siltstone with a chiseled pattern.
lore.nomansland.siltstone_bricks: A block of Polished Siltstone carved into bricks.
lore.nomansland.earthen_tiles: A combination of Terracotta and Mud resembling a tile pattern.
lore.nomansland.wooden_platform: A block even shorter than a Slab. Can be interacted with using Shears to become unstable.
lore.nomansland.wooden_platform_stairs: A block which can be stepped up without jumping. Can be interacted with using Shears to become unstable.
lore.nomansland.wooden_scaffolding: A block that can be climbed and traversed. It requires slightly more support from the ground or adjacent scaffolding.
lore.nomansland.ancestral_carving: A block of stone with an unknown face delicately carved into it.
lore.nomansland.inverted_bell: An enormous, ancient bell which can be rung.
lore.nomansland.large_ancient_pot: A block which may contain unknown items inside.
lore.nomansland.ancient_pot: A block which may contain unknown items inside.
lore.nomansland.moon_carving: A block of stone with the Moon's face delicately carved into it.
lore.nomansland.ancestral_effigy: A smaller stone pillar with an unknown face delicately carved into it.
lore.nomansland.straw_bed: A block used to skip the night. Does not set your respawn point.
lore.nomansland.thatch: A solid block made of dry vegetation.
lore.nomansland.field_mushroom_block: A block that breaks into Field Mushrooms.
lore.nomansland.shelf_mushroom: An item that grows off the side of varying logs in Forests.
lore.nomansland.shelf_mushroom_block: A larger Shelf Mushroom which can be stood on.
lore.nomansland.vermilion_froglight: A bright reddish light source produced when a Frog eats a Magma Cube.
lore.nomansland.podzol_path: A block that can be used to outline paths in your world.
lore.nomansland.mycelium_path: A block that can be used to outline paths in your world.
lore.nomansland.dirt_path: A block that can be used to outline paths in your world.
lore.nomansland.silt_path: A block that can be used to outline paths in your world.
lore.nomansland.gravel_path: A block that can be used to outline paths in your world.
lore.nomansland.sand_path: A block that can be used to outline paths in your world.
lore.nomansland.red_sand_path: A block that can be used to outline paths in your world.
lore.nomansland.snow_path: A block that can be used to outline paths in your world.
lore.nomansland.snowy_grass_path: A block that can be used to outline paths in your world.
lore.nomansland.pear_crate: A crate to compactly store 9 Pears.
lore.nomansland.apple_crate: A crate to compactly store 9 Apples.
lore.nomansland.tropical_fish_barrel: A crate to compactly store 9 Tropical Fish.
lore.nomansland.pufferfish_barrel: A crate to compactly store 9 Pufferfish.
lore.nomansland.billhook_bass_barrel: A crate to compactly store 9 Billhook Bass.
lore.nomansland.salmon_barrel: A crate to compactly store 9 Salmon.
lore.nomansland.cod_barrel: A crate to compactly store 9 Cod.
lore.nomansland.pebbles: An assortment of small stones and pebbles.
lore.nomansland.seashells: An assortment of tiny marine life and seashells.
lore.nomansland.icicles: A block that is sharp and will deal damage if it falls on you.
lore.nomansland.quartzite: A solid block of packed Quartz gemstone. This item can't be crafted back into Quartz.
lore.nomansland.budding_quartzite: A fragile block that grows Quartzite clusters.
lore.nomansland.small_quartzite_bud: A Quartzite bud that is still growing.
lore.nomansland.medium_quartzite_bud: A Quartzite bud that is still growing.
lore.nomansland.large_quartzite_bud: A Quartzite bud that is still growing.
lore.nomansland.quartzite_cluster: A fully grown Quartzite Cluster. Drops Quartz when mined.
lore.nomansland.honeyed_apple: A food covered in honey that restores additional saturation.
lore.nomansland.pear: A food that drops from Autumnal Oak Leaves and can restore a small amount of saturation.
lore.nomansland.syruped_pear: A food covered in syrup that restores additional saturation.
lore.nomansland.pine_nuts: A food that drops from Pine Leaves and can restore a tiny amount of saturation.
lore.nomansland.walnuts: A food that drops from Walnut Leaves and can restore a tiny amount of saturation.
lore.nomansland.trail_mix: A combination of various nuts and seeds that can be eaten.
lore.nomansland.grilled_mushrooms: A grilled fungus that can be eaten.
lore.nomansland.raw_horse: A meat that can be eaten raw or cooked. Dropped by Horses.
lore.nomansland.horse_steak: A meat that restores a lot of saturation when eaten, even more than Raw Horse.
lore.nomansland.raw_venison: A meat that can be eaten raw or cooked. Dropped by Deer.
lore.nomansland.cooked_venison: A meat that restores a lot of saturation when eaten, even more than Raw Venison.
lore.nomansland.frog_leg: A meat that can be eaten raw or cooked. Dropped by Frogs.
lore.nomansland.cooked_frog_leg: A meat that restores a lot of saturation when eaten, even more than uncooked Frog Legs.
lore.nomansland.raw_billhook_bass: A raw fish that can be eaten or cooked.
lore.nomansland.cooked_billhook_bass: A cooked fish that restores more saturation than Raw Billhook Bass.
lore.nomansland.sweet_tart: A pastry with berries and nuts that restores a small to moderate amount of saturation.
lore.nomansland.maple_tart: A pastry with Maple Syrup that restores a moderate amount of saturation.
lore.nomansland.pancake: A flat cake covered in Maple Syrup.
lore.nomansland.mashed_potatoes_with_mus: A mash of mushrooms and potatoes that restores a large amount of saturation.
lore.nomansland.maple_syrup_bottle: An item that can be used in crafting and cooking, or eaten.
lore.nomansland.hardtack: An item that can be eaten for a small to moderate amount of saturation.
lore.nomansland.blue_lupine: A flower that can be crafted into Blue Dye or placed into a Flower Pot.
lore.nomansland.red_lupine: A flower that can be crafted into Red Dye or placed into a Flower Pot.
lore.nomansland.yellow_lupine: A flower that can be crafted into Yellow Dye or placed into a Flower Pot.
lore.nomansland.pink_lupine: A flower that can be crafted into Pink Dye or placed into a Flower Pot.
lore.nomansland.autumn_crocus: A flower that can be crafted into Pink Dye or placed into a Flower Pot.
lore.nomansland.wild_mint: A flower that can be crafted into Light Gray Dye or placed into a Flower Pot.
lore.nomansland.starflower: A flower that can be crafted into White Dye or placed into a Flower Pot.
lore.nomansland.aconite: A flower that can be crafted into Blue Dye or placed into a Flower Pot.
lore.nomansland.thistle: A flower that can be crafted into Purple Dye or placed into a Flower Pot.
lore.nomansland.violet_flowerbed: A flowerbed which can be crafted into Magenta Dye.
lore.nomansland.blue_flowerbed: A flowerbed which can be crafted into Blue Dye.
lore.nomansland.white_flowerbed: A flowerbed which can be crafted into White Dye.
lore.nomansland.yellow_flowerbed: A flowerbed which can be crafted into Yellow Dye.
lore.nomansland.red_flowerbed: A flowerbed which can be crafted into Red Dye.
lore.nomansland.clover_patch: A dense patch of vegetation which can be crafted into Green Dye.
lore.nomansland.barrel_cactus: A plant which is a small and harmless cactus. Can be placed into a Flower Pot.
lore.nomansland.succulent: A plant which can be placed into a Flower Pot.
lore.nomansland.frosted_grass: A plant that sometimes drops Wheat Seeds when broken.
lore.nomansland.rafflesia: A plant that can be crafted into Red Dye.
lore.nomansland.rose_vines: A climbable plant with roses that is placed on walls.
lore.nomansland.beard_moss: A climbable plant which grows from leaves.
lore.nomansland.grass_sprouts: A plant that sometimes drops Wheat Seeds when broken.
lore.nomansland.tall_beachgrass: An overgrown grass found on beaches.
lore.nomansland.short_beachgrass: A short grass found on beaches.
lore.nomansland.dried_grass: A short, dry grass found in dry areas.
lore.nomansland.fiddlehead: A curly plant that sometimes drops Wheat Seeds when broken.
lore.nomansland.cave_weeds: A plant which grows from the floor of caves. Sometimes drops Beetroot Seeds when broken.
lore.nomansland.oat_grass: A plant that sometimes drops Wheat Seeds when broken.
lore.nomansland.cattail: An aquatic plant which grows along rivers. Sometimes drops String when broken.
lore.nomansland.reeds: An aquatic plant found along shores which sometimes drops String when broken.
lore.nomansland.water_mosaic: A colorful aquatic plant which grows over water.
lore.nomansland.pickleweed: A plant found in Swamps. Can be placed into a Flower Pot.
lore.nomansland.duckweed: An aquatic plant which grows over water.
